heading: Enable and Set up Private Endpoint Connections for a Project
body:
You can enable and set up private endpoints by using the Atlas UI and
Atlas Administration API. To enable private networking and set up a private
endpoint in your AKV (Azure Key Vault), you must do the following:

Atlas UI

Atlas Admin API

After you enable Encryption at Rest Using CMK (customer-managed key) (Over Private
Networking) for your project, you can enable [customer managed keys](azure-enable-cluster-encryption-at-rest-pvt-endpoint) using CMK (customer-managed key) for
each Atlas cluster in your project.
